title: Caramelized Crunchy Italian Vegetable Ribollita
description: A hearty and flavorful Italian dish featuring caramelized vegetables and crunchy texture, perfect for a midnight craving. This ribollita is made with demerara sugar and ayurvedic-rajasic-friendly ingredients.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the chopped onions and cook until they are translucent and starting to caramelize.
Add the chopped carrots and celery and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the demerara sugar and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the chopped kale and cook until it is wilted.
Add the cannellini beans, vegetable broth, and salt and pepper to taste.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat and simmer for 20 minutes.
Use an immersion blender to puree the soup until it is partially smooth.
Serve the ribollita hot, topped with grated parmesan cheese if desired.
